---
title: "Ejemplo avanzado con código typst: touying y más"
author: "Pedro L. Luque"
subtitle: "Quarto+Typst+Touying"
date: "2026-07-16"
date-format: long
institute: "Universidad de Sevilla"
lang: es
formato-typst-trans: true
es-memoria: false
es-slides: true
format:
  qmd-ptm-ty-slides-typst:
    aspect-ratio: "16-9"
    font-size: "18pt"
    section-level: 3
    header-color: "#003f72"
    section-color: "#995276"
    section-color-2: "#1a6b72"
    accent-color: "#c0392b"
    code-bg-color: "#dce8ff"
    output-bg-color: "none"
    keep-typ: true
    slide-numbering: true
    slide-numbering-min-level: 2
    toc-slide: true
    toc-levels: 3
    toc-font-size: "1em"
    toc-title: "Índice"
    fig-format: png
execute:
  warning: false
  message: false
knitr:
  opts_chunk:
    fig.width: 12
    fig.height: 10
    dpi: 300
---

```{=typst}
#import "@preview/cetz:0.5.2"
#import "@preview/fletcher:0.5.8" as fletcher: node, edge

// cetz and fletcher bindings for touying
#let cetz-canvas = touying-reduce.with(cetz)
#let fletcher-diagram = touying-reduce.with(fletcher)
```

# Ejemplo avanzado con código typst: touying y más

## Ejemplos avanzados con Typst

### CeTZ: canvas con pausas

CeTZ se integra en Touying mediante `#cetz-canvas` con pausas:

```{=typst}
#cetz-canvas({
  import cetz.draw: *
  rect((0,0), (5,5))
  (pause,)
  rect((0,0), (1,1))
  rect((1,1), (2,2))
  rect((2,2), (3,3))
  (pause,)
  line((0,0), (2.5, 2.5), name: "line")
})
```

### Fletcher: diagrama de estados

Diagrama de estados con Fletcher y pausas:

```{=typst}
#fletcher-diagram(
  node-stroke: .1em,
  node-fill: gradient.radial(blue.lighten(80%), blue, center: (30%, 20%), radius: 80%),
  spacing: 4em,
  edge((-1,0), "r", "-|>", `open(path)`, label-pos: 0, label-side: center),
  node((0,0), `reading`, radius: 2em),
  edge((0,0), (0,0), `read()`, "--|>", bend: 130deg),
  pause,
  edge(`read()`, "-|>"),
  node((1,0), `eof`, radius: 2em),
  pause,
  edge(`close()`, "-|>"),
  node((2,0), `closed`, radius: 2em, extrude: (-2.5, 0)),
  edge((0,0), (2,0), `close()`, "-|>", bend: -40deg),
)
```

### Ecuaciones Touying con pausa

Ecuación con revelado incremental mediante `pause`:

```{=typst}
$
  f(x) &= pause x^2 + 2x + 1  \
       &= pause (x + 1)^2  \
$
```



```{=typst}

]

#slide(repeat: 3, self => [
  #let (uncover, only, alternatives) = utils.methods(self)

  $
    f(x) &= pause x^2 + 2x + uncover("3-", 1)  \
         &= pause (x + 1)^2  \
  $
])




#slide[
  Touying equation with pause:

  $
    f(x) &= pause x^2 + 2x + 1  \
         &= pause (x + 1)^2  \
  $

  #meanwhile

  Touying equation is very simple.



```
